quicksight.analysis.axisdisplayrange.Cfn:
The range setup of a numeric axis display range.

This is a union type structure. For this structure to be valid, only one of the attributes can be defined.

quicksight.analysis.axisdisplayrange.Dat.Description: The data-driven setup of an axis display range.

quicksight.analysis.axisdisplayrange.Min.Description: The minimum and maximum setup of an axis display range.
